hero.title: Your Trusted Partner
hero.description: Since 2023, we deliver innovative solutions in plastic raw materials. With two warehouses in Istanbul and our Romania office, we serve Turkey and Europe.

about.title: Always By Your Side,
about.description1: Founded in 2023, Buteo Petrochemicals is a specialized distributor offering innovative solutions in the plastic raw materials sector, with expertise in engineering plastics.
about.description2: As the Turkey distributor for world-leading brands such as LG Chem and Basechem, we reliably deliver high-quality products to our customers.
about.feature1Desc: We prioritize your needs and produce fast, effective solutions to your challenges.
about.feature2Desc: We are a reliable solution partner standing by our customers at every step.
about.feature3Desc: With warehouses on both the European and Anatolian sides, we are closest to our customers.
about.feature4Desc: Same-day delivery to your factory within Istanbul city limits.
about.ctaTitle: We're Ready to Be Your Solution Partner
about.ctaDesc: Contact us for technical support and raw material supply for your projects.

services.title: Effective and
services.s1Desc: We offer company-specific stocked solutions for raw materials, color and additive masterbatch needs.
services.s2Desc: With R&D department support, we carry out raw material identification suitable for your process conditions in engineering plastics.
services.s3Desc: Same-day delivery to your factory within Istanbul. We are always by your side.

products.title: Wide Product
products.description: From polyolefins to engineering polymers, our extensive product range responds to your industry needs.
products.pageDesc: We provide solutions for our customers' needs with a wide product range in the plastic raw materials sector.
products.ctaTitle: Would You Like More Information About Our Products?
products.ctaDesc: Contact us for technical support and product information.

sectors.title: Industries
sectors.description: We offer specialized solutions in 11 different sectors.
sectors.pageDesc: We serve a wide range of industries from automotive to medical, construction to energy.
sectors.s1desc: High-strength engineering plastics for spare parts, interior/exterior trim and engine components.
sectors.s2desc: Reliable component solutions with heat, impact, and chemical-resistant raw materials.
sectors.s3desc: Durable and long-lasting plastics for home electronics and white goods manufacturing.
sectors.s4desc: Modern construction and infrastructure applications with high-strength products.
sectors.s5desc: Hygienic, reliable and certified raw materials for medical equipment manufacturing.
sectors.s6desc: Aesthetic, functional and durable plastic raw materials.
sectors.s7desc: Support for special projects with lightweight, durable and advanced engineering plastics.
sectors.s8desc: Modern agricultural technologies and equipment manufacturing with durable plastics.
sectors.s9desc: Plastic solutions resistant to salt water, sun and harsh environmental conditions.
sectors.s10desc: Safe, colorful and durable raw materials for the toy and hobby sector.
sectors.s11desc: Contribution to the energy sector with high electrical insulation, UV-resistant raw materials.
sectors.guideDesc: Raw material solutions tailored to each industry's needs
sectors.ctaDesc: Our expert R&D team provides raw material identification services tailored to your project.

partners.title: Strong
partners.description: We are the Turkey distributor for the world's leading petrochemical manufacturers.
partners.lgDesc: One of the world's largest chemical companies. Global leader operating in more than 70 countries.
partners.baseDesc: 30 years of manufacturing experience with strategic partnerships with OEM giants like Samsung, LG and Hyundai.

contact.title: Get in
contact.description: Contact us to get information about our products and services.
contact.roAddress: Bucureşti Sectorul 5, Strada MIHAIL KOGĂLNICEANU, Nr. 12, Clădirea C4, Camera 23
contact.formReply: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Specialized distributor in engineering plastics. LG Chem and Basechem Turkey distributor.

rnd.title: Not Just Raw Materials,
rnd.titleHighlight: We Also Produce Knowledge and Technology
rnd.d1: We analyze the chemical and physical properties of raw materials in detail.
rnd.d2: We guide our customers in selecting the right material for their application area.
rnd.d3: We measure the performance of plastic raw materials against challenging conditions.
rnd.d4: We contribute to projects developed by our customers with technical data and custom reports.

home.lgchemAllSub: LUPOY · LUPOX · LUMID · LUMILOY · LUCEL · LUSEP · KEYFLEX and more
home.basechemSub: Samsung · LG · Hyundai OEM Supplier — 30+ Years Experience

lgchem.heroDesc: As Buteo Petrochemicals, we have the right to sell all LG Chem engineering plastics, petrochemical products and additives in Turkey. You can directly source products from the global chemistry leader operating in more than 70 countries.
lgchem.featuredSubtitle: High value-added products specially marketed by Buteo Petrochemicals
lgchem.stdPolymersTitle: ABS · PC · ASA · PP — Product Grades
lgchem.stdPolymersSubtitle: Products available in Turkey from LG Chem's broad polymer portfolio
lgchem.why1Desc: A globally recognized and trusted brand operating in more than 70 countries.
lgchem.why2Desc: A technology pioneer developing next-generation materials through continuous innovation.
lgchem.why3Desc: Manufacturing processes secured by ISO international standards.
lgchem.why4Desc: Strategic partnerships with global giants like Hyundai, GM, Tesla, Samsung and LG.
lgchem.ctaTitle: Get a Quote for LG Chem Products
lgchem.ctaDesc: Request a price quote and technical datasheet for engineering plastics, petrochemical products or additives.

basechem.heroDesc: As Buteo Petrochemicals, we offer all compound products of Basechem, Korea's established engineering plastics manufacturer, in Turkey. We bring the proven quality supplied to Samsung, LG and Hyundai to your business.
basechem.featuredSubtitle: High-performance engineering plastics reflecting 30 years of Basechem expertise
basechem.allDesc: Available flame retardant, glass fiber reinforced and custom color variants for each product family
basechem.why1Desc: One of Korea's established engineering plastics compound manufacturers with over 30 years of production experience.
basechem.why2Desc: The industry's proven name, directly supplying global giants like Samsung, LG and Hyundai.
basechem.why3Desc: Consistent and reliable product in every batch with strict quality control systems throughout the production process.
basechem.why4Desc: Glass fiber ratio, color, flame retardant level — custom formulation development capacity.
basechem.oemDesc: Basechem's compound products, supplied to Korea's largest manufacturers for years, offer certified quality meeting global OEM standards.
basechem.ctaTitle: Get a Quote for Basechem Products
basechem.ctaDesc: Request a price quote and technical datasheet for ABS, PC, PBT, PC/ABS, PPO/PPE or PA products.
